title: BREAKING: Iran rejected all US demands refused to meet in Pakistan ceasefire stalled
description: Iran has rejected all US demands and refused to meet American officials in Pakistan. Ceasefire negotiations stalled.

title: Iran shot down US fighter jet warns UN vote provocative
description: Iran says it shot down US fighter jet warns against UN vote on defensive measures for shipping in the strait

title: Trump said Iran has no militant no navy begging for deal Iran rejected 32min later
description: TRUMP: They have no militant no navy they are begging to make deal. Iran: We are rejecting the deal and not coming for meeting with US.

title: US manufacturing PMI 52.7 despite Iran war prices paid 78.3
description: US Manufacturing PMI rose to 52.7 in March highest since Aug 2022. 3rd consecutive monthly expansion despite Iran war. Prices paid jumped +7.8 points to 78.3.

title: Trump $1.5 trillion defense budget largest since WW2
description: President Trump to unveil $1.5 trillion defense budget the largest yearly US military spending increase since World War II.

title: South Korea exports +41.9 percent YoY March strongest quarter since 2023
description: South Korea exports surged +41.9% YoY in March 2nd highest in at least 2 years. Strongest quarter since 2023.
